listening.title: Listening: Habit vs now
listening.transcript: I usually work in an office, but I am working from home today. She usually cooks dinner at seven, but right now, she is cleaning the kitchen instead.

questions.question: Where is the speaker working today?

listening.title: Listening: Review — Shopping and cooking now
listening.transcript: I have some rice and a few vegetables for dinner. I have plenty of rice, but I don't have any meat. I am cooking some soup right now.

questions.question: What is the speaker doing right now?
questions.explanation: "I am cooking some soup right now."
